case_title: LE NEVEU, STEPHEN et al VS MOSS, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LE NEVEU, STEPHEN KETCH, LORRAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSS, RICHARD BOLANOS, SONIA $1,134.12 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,239.12, SONIA BOLANOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LE NEVEU, STEPHEN KETCH, LORRAINE AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, RICHARD BOLANOS, SONIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S CONT.REQUEST RCVD; MAILED INFO RE: FEE;
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFT. RICHARD H. MOSS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, RICHARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOLANOS, SONIA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-05-2000, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAY-19-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S CONT.REQUEST CANCELLED PER HER PHONE CALL AND FOLLOW UP FAX;

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MOSS, RICHARD RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LE NEVEU, STEPHEN KETCH, LORRAINE $292.42 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $312.42, SONIA BOLANOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOSS, RICHARD BOLANOS, SONIA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LE NEVEU, STEPHEN KETCH, LORRAINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, RICHARD BOLANOS, SONIA
